languages.text: "Эоганн, тебе выпал уникальный шанс погрузиться в исследование сточных вод Футфола"
"Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, тебе выпал уникальный шанс погрузиться в исследование сточных вод Футфола"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."
"Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."
"Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."

languages.text: «Eogunn, se le ha concedido una oportunidad singular de realizar un estudio en profundidad de las aguas residuales de Paso».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, se le ha concedido una oportunidad singular de realizar un estudio en profundidad de las aguas residuales de Paso».

languages.text: “伊奥贡，你获得了一个千载难逢的机会，可以深入研究落脚港的废水。”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，你获得了一个千载难逢的机会，可以深入研究落脚港的废水。”

languages.text: "Eogunn, Euch wurde die einmalige Gelegenheit gewährt, das Abwasser von Footfall zu studieren."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, Euch wurde die einmalige Gelegenheit gewährt, das Abwasser von Footfall zu studieren."

languages.text: « Eogunn, vous bénéficiez là d'une occasion unique de vous plonger dans l'étude des eaux usées de Castel. »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, vous bénéficiez là d'une occasion unique de vous plonger dans l'étude des eaux usées de Castel. »

languages.text: "Eogunn, kendini Binliman'ın atık sularının incelenmesine kaptırmak için eşsiz bir fırsat yakaladın."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, kendini Binliman'ın atık sularının incelenmesine kaptırmak için eşsiz bir fırsat yakaladın."

languages.text: 「エオグン、あなたは、フットフォールの排水処理の研究に没頭する、非常に珍しい機会を与えられました」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."

traits.locale_text: 「エオグン、あなたは、フットフォールの排水処理の研究に没頭する、非常に珍しい機会を与えられました」
